perturbed_task_language: Pick the tomato sauce and place it in the basket
perturbation_semantics: Object frame layout (eef home z=0.26); basket relocated to right side at world (~0.0, +0.27, top z=0.13); 5 distractor sauces/cartons/boxes scattered across the workspace.
expected_baseline_behavior: Pi0 fullshot may pick the wrong (base-location) item under P2 layout; in this run perception+Pi0 confirmed the correct red tomato_sauce can.
strategy_notes: Coarse localization: probed image_cam_00 across rows 120-180/cols 40-220; identified basket near (col 200-220, row 105-130) at world (rim ~0.0, +0.27, z_top 0.13). Tomato sauce candidate at world (-0.09, -0.25, z_top 0.07) with RGB (58,8,0) — dark red. Issued pi0_pick from home with prompt 'pick up the tomato sauce'; Pi0 reported success=true, peak_lift=0.0896 m, min_gripper_opening=0.0427 (holding object). Wrist cam (image_wrist_01.png) confirmed a red can-top in the gripper. eef post-pick at (-0.10, -0.22, 0.14) matched the dark-red candidate xy. Carry plan: set_gripper +1 to firm the grip, then 3 move_to waypoints at z=0.22 (above basket-rim z=0.13) splitting the Δy=0.49 traversal into <0.30 steps. Final pose over basket center (-0.001, +0.252, 0.219); release → libero_terminated=true on first attempt.
